originalTitle: Live RL dev on PufferLib with Joseph Suarez
title: Refactoring PufferLib Models and C++ Backend for Simpler Codebase
summary: Worked on cleaning up PufferLib code by removing redundant functions and refactoring models and pufferlib C++ to reduce deep nesting. Debugged CUDA graph capture issues that caused instability with multiple buffers, eventually achieving stable training at 14M+ steps per second.
